title: Server Sided
description: A fabric 1.20.1 modpack that aims to provide the best possible gameplay while not requiring the user to install any mods.
body:
# What is this
A fabric 1.20.1 modpack _(recent versions include viaversion so players can connect with any version within reason)_ that aims to provide the best possible gameplay while not requiring the player to install any mods.

Thanks to countless hours of browsing modrinth, this modpack contains 250+ mods, their functionality varies from optimization to world generation mods.

This modpack features amazing world generation and many new or modified structures.
This modpack also features extensive customizability thanks to mods such as carpet.

# Installation
In the [GitHub README](https://github.com/CubeBeveled/server-sided/blob/main/README.md#how-to-install)

# Minimum system requirements
* Good CPU
* 8 GB of ram
* 2 GB disk
* Network connection
